title: Massive Scroll
description: Upon pickup, choose [blue]1[/blue] of [blue]3[/blue] [gold]Multiplayer Cards[/gold] to add to your [gold]Deck[/gold].
flavor: [red]Details for this relic will be revealed in the future...[/red]
notes: Only available in multiplayer runs (2+ players). Upon obtaining this relic, you are presented with a choice of 3 Multiplayer Cards and may add 1 of them to your deck.
